prompt: Run /kafka-skill-creator with the manifest at plugins/kafka-skill-creator/skills/kafka-skill-creator/evals/e2e/manifest.yml and --output /tmp/skill-out. The fixture is up (Kafka on localhost:9092 SASL/SCRAM, Karapace on localhost:8081 with HTTP basic auth), CONTEXTS_DEV_* env vars are exported in the parent shell, KAFKA_DOCKER_ARGS=--network=host is set, and podman is on PATH. Generate the skill end-to-end against the live cluster.

assertions.text: /tmp/skill-out/scripts/manifest.yml is a verbatim copy of the input manifest
/tmp/skill-out/references/cluster.md's Brokers table includes a row for broker id 1 with address localhost:9092
/tmp/skill-out/references/topics.md has a section header (e.g. `## payments.orders.v1`) for each of the three manifest topics
topics.md iterates topics in manifest order: payments.orders.v1 first, then payments.refunds.v1, then internal.audit.v1
/tmp/skill-out/references/groups.md has section headers for both `payments-orders-projector` and `payments-refunds-replayer`
the payments-refunds-replayer section reports a State value (Empty, Stable, or similar) — not a literal `<...>` placeholder
/tmp/skill-out/references/schemas/payments.orders.v1.json, payments.refunds.v1.json, and internal.audit.v1.json all exist; each is a JSON object containing at minimum `id`, `version`, `schema` fields
all five generated wrappers (consume.sh, describe-topic.sh, describe-group.sh, lag.sh, reset-offsets.sh) under /tmp/skill-out/scripts/ exist and have the executable bit set
/tmp/skill-out/scripts/.env.example contains a `# ---- context: dev ----` block (or equivalent header naming the dev context)
no file under /tmp/skill-out contains any unsubstituted template token from the placeholder deny-list documented in SKILL.md Step 4

the assistant's transcript shows the Step 5 smoke test (describe-topic.sh against the first manifest topic) ran and succeeded — exit 0, non-empty JSON output — rather than being skipped or surfacing a failure
